kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Login With Locked Out User

kw.name: When Enter Locked User Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Enter Locked User Credentials' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Locked User Credentials' found.

kw.name: Then Locked Out Error Message Is Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Attempt to log in with locked_out_user and verify the error message is shown
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Locked User Credentials' found.

test.name: TC_002 — Sort Products By Price Low To High

kw.name: When Enter Standard User Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Enter Standard User Credentials' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Standard User Credentials' found.

kw.name: Then User Is Logged In And On Products Page
When Sort Products By Price Low To High
Then Products Are Displayed From Cheapest To Most Expensive
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Log in as standard_user, sort products by Price low to high and verify the order
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Standard User Credentials' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Remove A Product From The Cart

kw.name: When Enter Standard User Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Enter Standard User Credentials' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Standard User Credentials' found.

kw.name: Then User Is Logged In And On Products Page
When Add A Product To The Cart
And Go To The Cart Page
And Remove The Product From The Cart
Then The Cart Is Empty And Badge Is Gone
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Log in as standard_user, add a product to cart, remove it and verify the cart is empty
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Standard User Credentials' found.
